calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge: Peter Busch, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # , Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

Petitioner: Yu Shao Chen, is present in pro per and is assisted in English/Cantonese translation by Katie Ouyang, Daughter-in-law.
Katie Ouyang, witness for the Petitioner, present.

Respondent: Alice Scott, present in pro per.

All parties and witnesses are sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is DENIED.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
